message:
test(bd-2c61): add unit tests for banner no_logo, transports, lerp, gradient, and interpolation

Cover StartupBanner no_logo, default transport, custom transport,
without description, lerp boundary values, interpolate_colors at
start/mid/end, gradient_text multi-line markup, and single-line case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
